posts.text:
For the “Keep Christ in Christmas” crowd … in case you need a reminder what the season IS actually about.

open.substack.com/pub/cannonsf...

With this latest mass shooting at Brown University, this might be a good time to mention that Bill Clinton’s assault weapons ban reduced mass shooting deaths by 43% - but after George W Bush & Republicans let it expire, mass shooting deaths spiked by 239%.

It's the guns!!! :(
One third of the country supported the January 6 2021 attempted take over the government & are the same ones who voted him back in. They are traitors in my book.

What a photograph. 

“Nearly two dozen arrested as faith leaders protested outside a federal immigration facility near Chicago…”

Arrested large amounts of peaceful clergy face first on pavement is a pretty good sign you’re not the good guys in the story. www.reuters.com/legal/govern...

In a world full of Wayne Gretzkys, be a Mario Lemieux 

mariolemieux.org
According to Fox News, if you are a racist Young Republican you are still a "kid" when you are 34, but if you are an Epstein victim, you are an adult when you're 15.

“Parents who, after consulting with a doctor and a psychologist, allow their 15-year-old child to transition commit child abuse. The child is too young to consent!”

--Megyn R. Kelly

“Grown men who have sex with your 15-year-old? Big whoop! It’s not like she’s 8. LOL!”

--Also Megyn R. Kelly

Day 40 of the Government shutdown and the evil is unrivaled 

 #politics #america #cannonsfodder #shutdown #aca #snap #shutdown2025
youtube.com/shorts/ob8BS...
I’m agreeing with Rand Paul now guys … shit is getting weird AF
It takes 67 Senators to impeach a SCOTUS justice but only 51 with sufficient will to add 6 more justices
8th grade me had no idea how serious the Constitution test was going to end up being

The Speaker of the House has firm views that Bad Bunny is a terrible pick for singing at the Super Bowl, but hasn't had time to watch the President's speech to our military leadership or form an opinion whether furloughed federal workers should be paid or Illinois' governor should be thrown in jail.

I have no idea how bad the information in the Epstein Files is but the Republican Party and the Billionaire Class are willing to let Trump misuse Federal Troops to invade American cities to distract from the release of the Epstein Files.

Gosh I wonder why the Republican speaker doesn’t want to debate the merits of the budget at hand. 
Does he not want the congressional record to reflect the Republican desire to more than double health insurance premiums for over 20min Americans? 

Why are they so ashamed of their own proposal?
Pope Leo XIV weighed in on U.S. politics, saying Catholic politicians must be judged on the full range of their policy positions and suggesting the country's immigration policy is "inhuman."
Pope Leo XIV denounced people who deny climate change today, arguing that they are contributing to the destruction of God's creation.

Ok so Isak got HIS first goal for Liverpool 😂😅

#lfc #isak #carabaocup
